summary: Iteration 99 - All features verified working: 1) CS Student Detail Modal restructured into tabbed interface with Info/Transactions/Calls/Update tabs - all tabs functional. 2) TransactionHistory component displays correctly in Transactions tab with Deposits/Withdrawals/Net Value summary. 3) Executive Dashboard Team Mood Pulse section shows team cards with mood scores. 4) GET /api/executive/team-mood endpoint returns team mood data (requires super_admin role). 5) GET /api/students/{id}/transaction-history endpoint returns correct data structure. 6) Executive Dashboard KPI cards render correctly with all revenue metrics.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 verified three major changes: 1) CS Student Detail Modal now has 4 tabs (Info, Transactions, Calls, Update) - the TransactionHistory component was already coded but was hidden below the fold in a long modal. The tabbed layout makes it immediately accessible. 2) Executive Dashboard has Team Mood Pulse section at the bottom showing team cards with Claret AI mood scores. Only TEAM CLOSING MACHINE has actual mood data (score 6.1 with 2/7 active users). Other teams show N/A. 3) The /api/executive/team-mood endpoint requires super_admin or admin role (sales_executive gets 403). 4) Claret AI system prompt enhancement is backend-only (claret_module.py) and doesn't need frontend testing.

cs_student_modal_tabbed_interface.details: Modal opens with 4 tabs: Info, Transactions, Calls, Update. All tabs have data-testid attributes (tab-info, tab-transactions, tab-calls, tab-update). Tabs switch correctly.

cs_modal_info_tab.details: Info tab shows student details: Package, Country, Classes, CS Agent, Mentor, Enrolled date, Student ID input, Color tags (Handle With Care, Do Not Disturb, VIP Client, Priority, Follow Up).

cs_modal_transactions_tab.details: Transactions tab shows TransactionHistory component with summary (Deposits, Withdrawals, Net Value) and transaction list. Component has data-testid='transaction-history'.

cs_modal_calls_tab.details: Calls tab shows CallHistory component. Shows 'No call history' when no calls recorded.

cs_modal_update_tab.details: Update tab shows stage update form with: Move to Stage dropdown, Classes Attended input, Onboarding Complete checkbox, Notes textarea, Cancel and Update Student buttons.

transaction_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/students/{id}/transaction-history returns {transactions: [], summary: {total_deposits, total_withdrawals, net_value}}. Works for CS head and super admin.

executive_dashboard_kpis.details: Executive Dashboard shows all KPI cards: Total Revenue (AED 558,507), Sales (AED 327,130), CS Revenue (AED 116,997), Academics (AED 114,380), Net Salary (AED 166,404), Total Payout (AED 214,792).

executive_dashboard_team_mood.details: Team Mood Pulse section visible at bottom of Executive Dashboard. Shows team cards with mood scores. TEAM CLOSING MACHINE has score 6.1 (2/7 active). Other teams show N/A. Section has data-testid='team-mood-section'.

team_mood_endpoint.details: GET /api/executive/team-mood returns {teams: [...], period: 'last_30_days'}. Each team has: team_name, team_id, member_count, avg_mood, avg_energy, avg_motivation, avg_stress, active_users, members[].

team_mood_access_control.details: Team mood endpoint requires super_admin or admin role. Sales executive gets 403 Forbidden. Unauthenticated requests get 401.

executive_dashboard_charts.details: All charts render correctly: Revenue Trend, Revenue by Department, Attendance Today, Gender Bifurcation, Course Bifurcation, Revenue by Course, Salary + Commission Payout, Top Performers, Department Headcount, Lead Sources, Documents Expiring.
